channel.title: Projects on Jayasri Pudota
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Jayasri Pudota

item.title: Bechdel test
item.description: The Bechdel Test is a quick way to check how women are shown in movies. It asks: Are there at least two named female characters who talk to each other about something besides a guy? It came from Alison Bechdel’s 1985 comic strip "Dykes to Watch Out For" and really makes you think about whether women get meaningful roles on screen. This was part of my personal project which I worked on where it analysis for gender disparity in Hollywood.

item.title: IPL Dashboard
item.description: This project creates an interactive platform to visualize and analyze IPL data, including batting/bowling stats, orange/purple cap holders, tournament 4's/6's, match outcomes etc,.
